description: Presence of Bacteria after Drug Treatments
proposed_title: Bacteria Presence Under Drug Treatment by Baseline Severity (hi/lo)
encoding_note: y='y' counts as Success (bacteria present); trt has 3 levels (placebo, drug, drug+); hilo is the stratum (hi/lo baseline). Aggregate repeated-measures rows per subject-week to (Treatment x Stratum) cells counting Successes (y='y') and Cases (total rows). Additional stratum candidate: ap (a/p).
